name: Baklava
method: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss nuts with cocoa powder after they've been chopped.
To suit the pan, cut the entire stack in a quarter.

Butter 2 layers of dough and put them in the pan.
Place two sheets of flour, butter, and nuts on top as you go.
Slice diamond forms to the sides of the hole with a paring blade.

While the baklava is cooking, make the sauce.
